overall.description: A cinematic game engine shot of a circular gothic divination classroom with stone walls, red velvet curtains, and tables holding glowing crystal balls. A character in dark robes stands near the left wall while a second character approaches, interacts briefly, and then departs toward the right. The scene is lit by warm candlelight and lamps with cool blue daylight visible through tall arched windows.

character exits the frame on the right side after walking across the room

segments.scene_description: A static camera captures a circular gothic classroom with stone walls, red curtains, and multiple tables holding glowing crystal balls. A robed NPC stands near the left wall while the player character walks from the center to interact with them, then departs toward the right and exits the frame. The room is illuminated by warm interior lighting with cool blue light filtering through tall windows.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot captures a static, wide perspective of a gothic divination classroom as a brief interaction unfolds and concludes. It begins with a view of the circular stone room, where warm candlelight and glowing crystal balls contrast with the cool blue light filtering through tall arched windows. As the player character moves from the center of the room toward the left, they engage with a robed figure standing against the stone wall draped in red velvet curtains. The scene then shifts in focus as the character departs from the NPC, walking across the room toward the right. Finally, the camera remains still as the character exits the frame, leaving the quiet, illuminated classroom behind.
